# Web Development

## Overview
Frontend web development skills used in this project.

## Technologies Used

### HTML
- Semantic HTML5 structure
- CSS Grid layout containers
- Google Fonts CDN integration

### CSS
- CSS Custom Properties (variables)
- CSS Grid (12-column layout)
- Flexbox (navigation, cards)
- Media queries for responsive design

### JavaScript
- ES6+ syntax (const, let, arrow functions)
- Fetch API for HTTP requests
- DOMContentLoaded event handling

## Project Structure
```
/
├── index.html          # Homepage
├── about.html          # About page
├── product-solutions.html
├── styles.css          # Global styles
├── script.js           # Navigation logic
└── news-display.js     # News collage
```

## Common Patterns
- [[Brutalist Grid System]]
- [[News Aggregator]]

## External Resources
- Google Fonts (Inter, Space Mono)
- RSS feeds from ArchDaily, Dezeen
